name: vaultstudio
description: Standalone streaming studio with native scene control, multi-platform chat, and unified stream stats

scripts.build:native: cd native/addon && npx cmake-js compile --out build-v1
scripts.electron:build:win: node scripts/assert-native-runtime.mjs --platform=win32 && node scripts/patch-electron-builder-extract.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: node scripts/assert-native-runtime.mjs --platform=linux && node scripts/patch-electron-builder-extract.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: node scripts/assert-native-runtime.mjs --platform=darwin && node scripts/patch-electron-builder-extract.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
